title: Gooey American Garlic Sumac Stir-fry
description: A delicious and quick weeknight dish featuring a gooey garlic sumac sauce that's perfect for the whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: 1 lb ground beef
ingredients.notes: ensure it is lean and low in fat

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as needed.
Deglaze the skillet with soy sauce, scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Stir in sumac and cayenne pepper. Cook for another 2-3 minutes or until all ingredients are evenly mixed.
Add sliced bell pepper to the skillet, reduce heat to medium and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until peppers are tender.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
